sentence_1: Stage 1 is the lightest stage of sleep, where we are just drifting off.
sentence_2: Stage 2 is a period of deep relaxation where our brain waves slow down, and we begin to disengage from our surroundings.
sentence_3: Stage 3 is the deepest stage of sleep, where our body repairs and regenerates itself.
